report.summary: Created OG images for 2 new learn guides (Flash Loans Guide 2026, DeFi Vaults Guide 2026), fixed critical 'use client' + metadata export conflict on flash loans page, added zebra striping to all comparison tables, replaced plain link lists with styled Related Guides card grids, and updated OG metadata to reference static SVGs

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed critical build issue: removed 'use client' directive from flash-loans-guide-2026 page — client components cannot export Next.js metadata; the metadata was being silently ignored
Added zebra striping (alternating rgba(255,255,255,0.02) row backgrounds) to Protocol Comparison table and Flash Loans vs Traditional Lending table on flash loans page
Added zebra striping to Vault Type Comparison table on DeFi vaults page for improved scanability

Replaced plain 'Learn More' link list on flash loans page with a 4-card Related Guides grid (DeFi Vaults, Aave V4, DeFi Options, DeFi Safety) — improves cross-linking and keeps users on-site per article reading flow pattern

Replaced plain 'Continue Learning' link list on DeFi vaults page with a 4-card Related Guides grid (Flash Loans, Pendle Finance, Morpho Protocol, Stablecoin Yield Strategies) — cross-links the two new pages to each other
Updated OG image schema reference on flash loans page from non-existent 'og-flash-loans.png' to correct 'og-flash-loans-guide-2026.svg'
Added OpenGraph images metadata to both pages pointing to new static SVG files

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: flash-loans-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with lightning bolt visualization, 3-step transaction flow diagram (Borrow → Execute → Repay), 'All in 1 Block' badge, stats pills ($30B+ Aave, 0.05% Fee, 0 Collateral), protocol tags (Aave, dYdX, Uniswap, Balancer), degen0x branding

OG image: defi-vaults-structured-products-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with vault architecture diagram showing 4 strategy types (Lending/Morpho, Yield Token/Pendle, Options/Covered Calls, Liquidity/Kamino), deposit/yield flow arrows, auto-compounding yield chart, stats pills ($12B+ TVL, 6 Vault Types, 3-25% APY), degen0x branding

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/flash-loans-guide-2026 — 939-line guide with 8 sections, 2 comparison tables, FAQ, code examples. Fixed 'use client' conflict, added zebra striping to both tables, upgraded Related Guides to card grid, updated OG metadata

/learn/defi-vaults-structured-products-guide-2026 — 693-line guide with 8 sections, vault comparison table, FAQ, risk checklist. Added zebra striping, upgraded Related Guides to card grid, added OG image metadata

sections.title: UX Audit Notes
items: Both pages have proper mobile support via overflowX:auto on tables and maxWidth:820 article container
Breadcrumb navigation correctly shows Home > Learn > Guide Name hierarchy on both pages
BackToTop component present on both pages
Category badges (DeFi, Intermediate) and reading time metadata are visible and well-positioned
DeFi Vaults page correctly uses server component pattern (no 'use client'); Flash Loans page now also correctly uses server component pattern after fix
Both pages include StructuredData with combined Article + FAQ schemas
Internal links distributed throughout both articles using consistent #58a6ff link color
